What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A white oval sink basin sits centrally with a chrome faucet mounted on the deck. To the right, a green box of Polident cleanser rests near a blue bottle of Listerine mouthwash in the background, while a tube of lip balm lies on the left side. A hand enters holding a green toothbrush over the basin, then wipes the counter surface with a white cloth.

question: Where is the green box of Polident cleanser positioned relative to the white oval sink? A. To the left of the sink B. To the right of the sink C. Behind the sink D. Over the sink basin

Describe the sequence of cleaning actions performed by the hand over the bathroom counter.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a hand enters holding a toothbrush over the sink basin; at 12s, the hand moves the green toothbrush across the faucet area; at 14s, the hand holds a white rectangular soap object above the sink; at 16s, the hand holds a white cloth and toothbrush while wiping the counter surface.

canonical_answer: The person uses the toothbrush to scrub the chrome faucet.
